name: 第一中尉法洛 | 特警
nameZh: 第一中尉法洛 | 特警
descriptionEn: Smart as a whip and relentlessly polite, 1st Lieutenant Farlow is one of the most beloved and respected officers in SWAT. A master tactician in hostage and barricade situations, Farlow quickly climbed the SWAT ranks. Don't be fooled by her overwhelmingly cheerful nature--she can dispatch bad guys in the blink of an eye and not think twice about it. What are they doing over there? Drinking milkshakes?
descriptionZh: 第一中尉法洛是一个彬彬有礼的小机灵鬼，她是特警队里最受欢迎、最受爱戴的军官之一。法洛被称为障碍排除及解救人质的战术大师，这让她很快在队内得到提拔。不要被她天性开朗的外表所欺骗，她可是拥有能在一瞬间搞定敌人的本领，行动果敢而迅速。 他们在那里搞什么呢？喝奶昔？！
